thought.text: 我将查看 Task4 配置、主程序和已有 Pass。

action.command:
sed -n '1,180p' /workspace/YatCC/task/4/config.cmake; printf '
--- CMake ---
'; sed -n '1,220p' /workspace/YatCC/task/4/CMakeLists.txt; printf '
--- main ---
'; sed -n '1,260p' /workspace/YatCC/task/4/main.cpp; printf '
--- ConstantFolding ---
'; sed -n '1,260p' /workspace/YatCC/task/4/ConstantFolding.hpp; sed -n '1,360p' /workspace/YatCC/task/4/ConstantFolding.cpp; printf '
--- Mem2Reg ---
'; sed -n '1,260p' /workspace/YatCC/task/4/Mem2Reg.hpp; sed -n '1,420p' /workspace/YatCC/task/4/Mem2Reg.cpp

tool_call.name: terminal
